---

- [ ] I checked `AGENTS.md` and the README of the directory I'm contributing to (e.g. `FormalConjectures/ErdosProblems/README.md`)
- [ ] Every result carries a `@[category ...]` and an `@[AMS ...]` attribute
- [ ] Docstrings quote the source verbatim, with references in the module docstring
- [ ] I searched `FormalConjecturesForMathlib` and neighboring files for existing definitions, API, and notation before adding my own
- [ ] New definitions or attribute behavior come with `@[category test]` / demo tests
- [ ] `lake --wfail build` passes locally
